properties.title: Archive of Census Related Products (ACRP): 1990 Enhanced Migration Files
properties.description: The 1990 Enhanced Migration Files portion of the Archive of Census Related Products (ACRP) contains migration data derived from the U.S. Census Bureau's Summary Tape File (STP-28). The data includes counts by race and hispanic origin within each county, county to county, and state to state. This portion of the ACRP is produced by the Columbia University Center for International Earth Science Information Network (CIESIN).
properties.purpose: To provide migration data at the county and state levels for the U.S.
properties.authors: Center for International Earth Science Information Network - CIESIN
properties.publishers: NASA Socioeconomic Data and Applications Center (SEDAC)
properties.citation: Center for International Earth Science Information Network - CIESIN. 1996-12-31T00:00:00Z. Archive of Census Related Products (ACRP): 1990 Enhanced Migration Files.
